Who We Are

Powering El Paso for Over a Decade

Dantex Electrical Contractors started with a simple mission: to provide honest and reliable electrical services to our neighbors in El Paso. Founded by a master electrician with deep roots in the community, we've grown from a small operation to a trusted name in residential and commercial electrical work.

We believe in doing things the right way, every time. That means using quality materials, employing skilled technicians, and adhering to the highest safety standards. Our commitment to excellence ensures your electrical systems are safe, efficient, and built to last.

El Paso is our home, and we're dedicated to giving back. We actively support local initiatives and organizations, striving to make our community a better place to live and work. When you choose Dantex Electrical Contractors, you're choosing a company that cares.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Dantex Electrical Contractors

Expert Technicians

Our licensed and experienced electricians possess the skills and knowledge to handle any electrical challenge.

Upfront Pricing

No surprises. We provide clear and detailed estimates before any work begins, so you know exactly what to expect.

24/7 Emergency Service

Electrical emergencies don't wait, and neither do we. We're available around the clock to address urgent issues.

Quality Workmanship

We stand behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee. Your safety and peace of mind are our top priorities.

Get a Free Electrical Estimate

Contact Dantex Electrical Contractors today for reliable electrical solutions in El Paso.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

I had Dantex Electrical Contractors upgrade my electrical panel in my older home in Kern Place. They were professional, efficient, and explained everything clearly. I feel much safer now. Great service!

Maria G. Electrical Panel Upgrade
“

Dantex installed new recessed lighting in my living room. The work was well done, and the electrician was very courteous. There was a small delay in getting the fixtures, but overall, a great experience.

David S. Lighting Installation
“

I had a power outage in my home, and Dantex Electrical Contractors responded quickly. They diagnosed the problem and fixed it promptly. I highly recommend them for any electrical issues.

Linda K. Electrical Repair
“

Dantex Electrical Contractors has been our go-to electrician for our restaurant for years. They are always reliable, professional, and provide quality work. We highly recommend them!

Robert B. Commercial Electrical Services
“

We had Dantex install a whole-house generator. The installation process was smooth and professional. We feel so much better prepared for power outages now. Only downside was the paperwork at the end, but they were helpful resolving it.

Jessica M. Generator Installation
“

Dantex wired our new home addition. They did an excellent job and were very detail-oriented. The work passed inspection with no issues. Very pleased with their service.

Michael T. Electrical Installation

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How quickly can you respond to an electrical emergency?
We offer 24/7 emergency service and strive to respond to urgent calls as quickly as possible, typically within the hour.
Are your electricians licensed and insured?
Yes, all of our electricians are fully licensed and insured, ensuring your protection and peace of mind.
Do you offer a warranty on your repairs?
Yes, we stand behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee. We offer warranties on parts and labor for all repairs.
